metadata.title: Ubuntu System Assessment Results - FedRAMP Rev 5 Low

activities.title: Mapped XCCDF evidence analysis
activities.description: XCCDF rule results were normalized and mapped to FedRAMP Rev 5 Low control identifiers.

steps.title: Parse XCCDF rule results
steps.description: Collected rule pass/fail results for all 5 Ubuntu servers.

steps.title: Map rules to controls
steps.description: Used component definition implemented-requirement Rule_Id properties to associate evidence with controls.

results.title: FedRAMP Rev 5 Low assessment execution results
results.description: Assessment results for the Ubuntu 24.04 LTS 5-server fleet evaluated against FedRAMP Rev 5 Low using mapped XCCDF evidence.

entries.title: Evidence collection completed
entries.description: Collected XCCDF results from all assessed Ubuntu server subjects.

entries.title: Control mapping analysis completed
entries.description: Mapped rule-level evidence to control identifiers using component definitions and regulatory mappings.
